---
title: "Preview a recipe DAG"
subtitle: "Turn a plan into a recipe and inspect its graph before execution."
sidebar: cookbook
---

## Use when

You want to review feature routing before running an extractor chain.

```{python}
from natural_features.core.recipe import as_mermaid
from natural_features.workflows import plan_features

plan = plan_features(
    "The scene opens on a quiet room.",
    features=["text.tokenize"],
)
recipe = plan.to_recipe()
recipe
```

## Render the graph

```{python}
print(as_mermaid(recipe))
```

## Boundary it closes

The graph shows where values enter as `input:` tokens and where step outputs become downstream references. That makes routing review separate from runtime execution.

## See also

[Recipes and DAGs](../concepts/recipes-and-dags.qmd)
